Who We Are

Built for brands that mean business.

Mahira Labs is a premium social media agency focused on one thing — making your brand impossible to ignore. We take the burden of digital management entirely off your plate, replacing inconsistency with expert-led strategy and creative excellence.

Our mission is to bridge the gap between creative imagination and strategic growth. We believe professional marketing should be accessible to businesses of every size, not just the big players.

Our vision is to lead the next era of social media management — transforming your digital presence from a source of pressure into a powerful engine for sustainable brand legacy.

The Specialist Triangle
🎨

Creative Excellence

Thumb-stopping content built with purpose — every visual, caption, and reel crafted to convert.

📈

Strategic Growth

Data-informed decisions, SEO-driven captions, and content intelligence fuelling your trajectory.

🤝

Account Management

Full-service handling — so you focus on your business while we run your digital world.

Our Process

How we work with you.

Every client relationship follows the same four-step process — designed to make onboarding seamless and results inevitable.

Step 01

Discovery

We learn your business, audience, and goals inside out before touching a single post. This is where great results are built.

Step 02

Strategy

A custom monthly content plan built around your brand, niche, and growth targets — no templates, no guesswork.

Step 03

Execution

We design, write, schedule, and publish — you approve, we handle the rest. Consistent, high-quality delivery every month.

Step 04

Reporting

Monthly performance reports with clear insights and recommendations — always transparent, always actionable.

What We Do

Every service your brand needs.

From content creation to full account management — we cover every dimension of your social media presence.

📸

Social Media Management

End-to-end management of your Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok accounts. Consistent posting, timely responses, and a brand voice that never wavers.

🎬

Content Creation

Posts, reels, carousals, and stories crafted with intention. Every piece strategically designed to engage, retain, and convert your audience.

✍️

Caption Writing & SEO

Multilingual captions (up to 3 languages) with deep SEO keyword integration — so your content gets found and felt by the right people.

📊

Monthly Reporting & Analytics

Detailed performance reports giving you clear visibility into growth, engagement, and reach — and exactly what's working each month.

🧭

Content Strategy

A clear, intentional direction for your content — built around your brand story, audience psychology, and platform-specific best practices.

🎯

Brand Identity & Setup

Colour palettes, strategic usernames and bios, brand voice guides, and content calendars — the foundations that make your brand unforgettable.

💬

Community Management

Active engagement with your audience — replying to comments, managing DMs, and building genuine relationships that turn followers into fans.

🚀

Growth Advisory

Monthly strategic recommendations on content direction, audience targeting, and platform-specific tactics to accelerate your growth trajectory.

🌟

Collaborator Guidance

Influencer shortlisting, outreach templates, and campaign coordination to extend your brand reach through the right partnerships.

Packages

The right fit for every brand.

Three tiers built for different stages of growth. Each one expert-led, results-driven, and crafted to scale with you.

Tier 01
Starter
Perfect for brands establishing their digital foundation and building a consistent presence.
  • 8 posts + 2 reels per month
  • 2-language captions
  • Account management
  • Monthly performance report
  • Content strategy
  • 1–3 platforms available
Enquire on WhatsApp →
Most Popular
Tier 02
Growth
For brands ready to scale — with more content, deeper strategy, and a competitive edge.
  • 6 posts, 4 reels + 2 carousals
  • 3-language captions
  • SEO keyword-focused content
  • Content calendar & colour palette
  • Growth advisory sessions
  • Community management
Enquire on WhatsApp →
Tier 03
Pro
Full-service domination for brands that want to lead their category and build lasting brand legacy.
  • 10 posts, 6 reels + 4 carousals
  • All languages supported
  • Full SEO caption analysis
  • Brand voice guide
  • Collaborator guidance
  • Full community management
  • Advanced content strategy
  • Stories & highlights management
Enquire on WhatsApp →

Available across 1, 2, or all 3 platforms — Instagram, Facebook & TikTok. Contact us for pricing →

Why Mahira Labs

Specialists, not generalists.

01

No interns, no templates. Every piece of content is crafted by specialists who understand your market and your audience.

03

We eliminate the inconsistency problem. Your brand shows up — beautifully, strategically, every single week.
